blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,012 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: light drizzle, highs of 49°F, winds around 22 mph.
Thursday: overcast, highs of 58°F, gusts to 42 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 11.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 34".
